2603.20839.title: Dodgersort: Uncertainty-Aware VLM-Guided Human-in-the-Loop Pairwise Ranking
2603.20839.paper_summary: Pairwise comparison labeling is emerging as it yields higher inter-rater reliability than conventional classification labeling, but exhaustive comparisons require quadratic cost. We propose Dodgersort, which leverages CLIP-based hierarchical pre-ordering, a neural ranking head and probabilistic ensemble (Elo, BTL, GP), epistemic--aleatoric uncertainty decomposition, and information-theoretic pair selection. It reduces human comparisons while improving the reliability of the rankings. In visual ranking tasks in medical imaging, historical dating, and aesthetics, Dodgersort achieves a 11--16\% annotation reduction while improving inter-rater reliability. Cross-domain ablations across four datasets show that neural adaptation and ensemble uncertainty are key to this gain. In FG-NET with ground-truth ages, the framework extracts 5--20$\times$ more ranking information per comparison than baselines, yielding Pareto-optimal accuracy--efficiency trade-offs.
2603.20839.paper_summary_zh: 成對比較標記正在興起，因為它比傳統的分類標記產生更高的評審者間可靠性，但全面比較需要二次成本。我們提出了 Dodgersort，利用基於 CLIP 的層次預排序、一個神經排名頭和概率集成（Elo、BTL、GP）、認知--隨機不確定性分解以及信息理論的配對選擇。它減少了人類比較的需求，同時提高了排名的可靠性。在醫學影像、歷史年代和美學的視覺排名任務中，Dodgersort 實現了 11--16\% 的標註減少，同時提高了評審者間的可靠性。跨四個數據集的跨領域消融實驗顯示，神經適應和集成不確定性是這一增益的關鍵。在 FG-NET 中，利用真實年齡，該框架每次比較提取的排名信息比基準高出 5--20$\times$，實現了帕累托最優的準確性--效率權衡。
2603.20839.author: Yujin Park et.al.
2603.20839.authors: Yujin Park, Haejun Chung, Ikbeom Jang
